summary: Iteration 17 - Testing Phase 1 (Security), Phase 3 (Gmail email parsing), Phase 4 (SMS parsing). Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. Security setup flow, Settings tabs (Sources, Security), and all existing pages tested successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Not shown on web platform (expected behavior - biometric not available on web)

critical_code_review_comments: Login button in React Native Web renders as DIV without role=button - may need data-testid for better automation
PIN dial pad buttons have data-testid but it's rendered as testID on web - consider adding web-compatible data-testid
Gmail sync requires real OAuth completion - frontend correctly shows Connect Gmail button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1/3/4 features fully working: 1) Security Setup shows after first login with PIN creation flow (4-digit dial pad), 2) Settings > Security tab shows App PIN Lock toggle and AES-256 encryption info, 3) Settings > Sources tab shows Gmail Email Parsing with Connect Gmail button and SMS Transaction Parsing section, 4) Backend encryption roundtrip works correctly, 5) SMS parsing creates transactions in database

details: Security Setup screen shows 'Secure Your Data' title after first login
Features displayed: 4-digit PIN lock, Biometric authentication, Auto-lock after 5 min, Encrypted data storage
'Set Up PIN' button opens Create PIN screen with dial pad
Entering 4-digit PIN moves to Confirm PIN screen
Confirming PIN completes setup and shows Dashboard
'Skip for now' button allows bypassing security setup
Security & Privacy section visible
Security status banner shows 'Security Not Configured' or 'Security Active'
App PIN Lock toggle with status description
DATA ENCRYPTION section shows: AES-256 field-level encryption, Per-user encryption keys, PAN & Aadhaar encrypted at rest
Gmail Email Parsing section with Connect Gmail button
Supported Banks list: HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis, Kotak, Yes Bank, PNB, BOB, IndusInd
SMS Transaction Parsing section
Android-only note for SMS parsing
GET /api/gmail/status returns {connected: false} for unauthenticated user
GET /api/gmail/connect returns auth_url starting with https://accounts.google.com
OAuth URL contains required params: client_id, redirect_uri, scope, state, gmail.readonly
POST /api/sms/parse correctly parses HDFC debit SMS (Rs.5,000.00 → expense)
POST /api/sms/parse correctly parses SBI credit SMS (Rs.25,000.00 → income)
Batch parsing works for multiple SMS messages
Parsed transactions are persisted in database
encrypt_field then decrypt_field returns original value
Different user DEKs produce different ciphertext
Non-encrypted values pass through unchanged
Batch encrypt/decrypt of sensitive fields works correctly
Login returns decrypted PAN (not ENC: prefixed)
Dashboard: Financial Health Score, Overview cards, Expense Breakdown, Trend Analysis working
Transactions: Transaction list loading correctly
Insights: Financial metrics displaying
Invest: Indian Markets live data, Portfolio Overview with categories

api_test_results.auth_login: PASS - Returns token and user with decrypted PAN
api_test_results.gmail_connect: PASS - Returns valid Google OAuth URL

mocked_apis.SMS parsing: Real transaction parsing - creates actual transactions in DB
